plan.title: Refactor route handlers to idiomatic Effect — extract shared services, eliminate imperative wrappers

items.title: Define typed error types for all services

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/services/typed-errors.ts with Data.TaggedError types: TrackerNotConfigured, IssueNotFound, RateLimited, WorkspaceNotFound, AgentAlreadyRunning, BeadsNotInitialized, PlanEmpty. These are shared across all new services and route error handlers.

Create LinearClient service using ServiceMap.Service pattern. Methods: getIssue, updateState, getTeamStates, addComment. Extracts ~25 inline fetch() calls to Linear GraphQL from issues.ts, agents.ts, mission-control.ts, misc.ts. Includes API key management, retry on 429, typed errors.
Create GitHubClient service. Methods: getIssue, addLabel, removeLabel, createComment, closeIssue. Extracts GitHub REST API calls from issues.ts, specialists.ts, agents.ts. Rate limit header tracking.
Create RallyClient service. Methods: getIssue, updateState. Maps canonical statuses to Rally state values. Extracts Rally WSAPI calls from issues.ts.

Create IssueLifecycle service that unifies 'move issue to status X + patch cache + emit event' pattern duplicated across 9+ endpoints. Methods: transitionTo, addLabel, removeLabel, close. Depends on tracker clients, EventStoreService, and issue-data-service cache.
Create WorkspaceService to replace src/lib/workspace-manager.ts (1030L). Methods: create, clean, containerize. Handles git worktree creation, project workspace_command, Docker containers.
Create AgentSpawner to replace src/lib/agents.ts (1222L). Methods: startWork, startPlanning, kill, deepWipe. Depends on IssueLifecycle and WorkspaceService.

items.title: Refactor major route files to use Effect services

narrative.Action: Refactor the 6 largest route files (agents.ts 1741L, issues.ts 2230L, specialists.ts 2193L, workspaces.ts 3711L, mission-control.ts 1222L, misc.ts 1702L) to use the new Effect services instead of inline imperative code. Replace Effect.tryPromise wrappers with Effect.gen + service calls + typed error handling.

items.title: Refactor minor route files + wire service layers in server.ts

narrative.Action: Refactor remaining 7 route files (settings, remote, costs, metrics, resources, conversations, cloister) and update server.ts to compose all new service layers.

items.title: Update CLI callers to use Effect services

narrative.Action: Update ~15 CLI command files that import from src/lib/agents.ts and src/lib/workspace-manager.ts to use the new Effect services with runPromise/runSync. Remove or deprecate old lib modules.
Write integration tests verifying route→service→Effect chains and error channel tests ensuring consistent JSON error responses across all error types.

items.title: Final quality gates — typecheck, lint, full test suite

narrative.Action: Run all quality gates, fix any remaining issues, ensure clean build.
